description.from:
Deals 56*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 43.4% ATK M.DMG 3 times to enemies within range, applies [Flame] 1 stacks, and knocks them down for 3sec.
Afterward, for 5sec, Normal Attacks deal 34*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 26.1% ATK M.DMG and apply [Flame] 1 stacks. DMG of this skill increases by 2% per [Flame] stack.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range and knocks them down, inflicting 3 stacks of Flame. Then for 15 sec, each auto attack deals ??? M.DMG and inflicts 1 stack of Flame on enemy. Per each stacked Flame, DMG is increased by 2%. Each Flame stack deals separate M.DMG and reduces Heal rate by 1%.

description.from: For 5sec, increases all allies’ M.DEF by 280*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and M.Block Chance by 400, and applies [Flame] 1 times to nearby enemies every 1sec.
description.to: For 20 sec, all allies' M.DEF is increased by ??? and M.Block Chance is increased by 250. Additionally, every 1 sec, inflicts 1 stack of Flame on nearby enemies.

description.from: Deals 180*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 113.7% ATK M.DMG 3 times to enemies within range and knocks them down. DMG increases by 2% per [Flame] stack.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range and inflict knock down. Per every stacked Flame, DMG is increased by 2%.

description.from:
On Block, deals 25*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 15.7% ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies, applies [Flame] 5 stacks, and increases own M.DEF by 6% for 6sec. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

[Flame]: Deals 3% ATK M.DMG every 1sec for 20sec and reduces Heal Rate by 1%. This effect stacks up to 100 times.
description.to: Upon Block, deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range, and inflicts 3 stack of Flame.

IV.from: M.Block Chance boost is increased by 25 %.
IV.to: M.Block Chance Boost is increased by 50%.

light.from: Attack Speed is increased by 30% for 3 sec.
light.to: ATK Spd is increased by 200 for 15 sec.

dark.from: For each enemy hit, cooldown is reduced by 10%.
dark.to: Reduces cooldown by 6% per each enemy hit.

light.from: Magic Block Chance is additionally increased by 25%.

dark.from: During the duration, deals damage to nearby enemies equal to 40% of your Magic Defense.
dark.to: While Hellfire is active, deal DMG based on own M.DEF to nearby enemies.

light.from: When you block, the maximum number of Magic Defense increase stacks is changed to 10.
light.to: Increases own M.DEF by 5% per each block. Max stack is 10.

description.from: [Burning Power] Increases DMG by {0}%, and Flame stacked upon enemies become irremovable.
description.to: [Burning Power] Increases DMG by {0}% and Flame stacked upon enemies become irremovable.

description.from: [Lava Eruption] Increases DMG by {0}%, and reduces the target's M.DEF by 25% for 7 sec.
description.to: [Lava Eruption] DMG is increased by {0}% and target's M.DEF is decreased by 25% for 7 sec.

description.from: [Fire Smash] Increases the number of Flame Stacks by 3. Hit targets have their ATK Spd reduced by {0} for 5 sec.
description.to: [Fire Smash] Increases the number of Flame stacks by 3. Hit targets have their ATK Spd reduced by {0} for 5 sec.

description.from: On Normal Attack, has a 20% chance to reduce the target's ATK by {0}% and reduce Magic DEF by {1}% for 5 sec. If [Flame] has 100 or more stacks, the Magic DEF reduction is multiplied by 2.
description.to: Normal attacks have a 20% chance to reduce ATK of the target by {0}% and cause the target to take {1}% increased M.DMG for 10 sec. If the target has more than 100 stacks of Flame, M.DMG boost is doubled.

description.from: Deals 450% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies within a circular area and knocks them down for 1.8sec. Afterwards, summons Flame of Victory, Carprain for 13sec, increasing own ATK by 45%.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies within a circular range of self and knocks them down for 3 sec. Afterwards, summons Flame of Victory, Carprain for 13 sec, increasing self's ATK by 60%.

1.from: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by 14%.
1.to: For the duration of Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by 50%.

2.from: For the duration of the soul, reduces M.DEF of nearby enemies by 22.5%. Against Bosses, reduces it by 45%.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, Increases M.DMG all nearby enemies take by 40%. The effect is inflicted by 80% against Bosses.
